AdvancedInserterBlock.DescriptionInserter:
On an electric pulse, pulls items from the rear container into the front one.
Place samples in filter slots and use allow-list or deny-list; an empty list filters nothing.
With no front container, items are ejected.
AdvancedInserterBlock.DescriptionFluidInserter:
On an electric pulse, moves roughly one bucket of fluid from the rear tank to the front tank.
Place sample fluids and use allow-list or deny-list; an empty list filters nothing.

LogisticsStorageUnitBlock.Description: Expandable storage. Adjacent units share one vault whose capacity grows with the cluster; right-click to open, and page when it fills up. Inserters can pull from and push into the sides.

Descriptions.AdvancedInserter: Upgrade an inserter with a circuit and logic gates
Descriptions.AdvancedFluidInserter: Upgrade a fluid inserter with a circuit and logic gates
